selected_title: Analysis of Market Regulation Mechanism and Spillover Efficiency of Knowledge Spillover in Regional Innovation Network System
question: Where does “Analysis of Market Regulation Mechanism and Spillover Efficiency of Knowledge Spillover in Regional Innovation Network System” support or contradict the causal account advanced by “Empirical Analysis on the Mediating Role of Absorptive Capacity between Knowledge Spillover and Innovative Performance of Firms within High-tech Industry Cluster”?

evidence_spans.text: According to the analysis of the knowledge spillover effects in regional innovation network system, this article has brought forward market regulation mechanism of knowledge spillover, considering that under the definite arrangement of institution, the market will regulate knowledge spillover, knowledge spillover will attain balanced state, and this kind of regulation will prompt the spiral development of regional innovational network, based on these, this article has also analyzed the circular process of knowledge spillover and knowledge absorption.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Spillover effect, Knowledge spillover through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 76 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
